problem: How to produce defect-free large-area graphene at low cost?
hypothesis: The key to How to produce defect-free large-area graphene at low cost? is Self-assembled monolayer for surface functionalization — specifically Self-assembled monolayer for — which would help 3,000,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Synthesis and characterization with 32 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
